research_question_variants.question: Research how our metrics compare: 60% V2X integration, 85% encryption by Q1 2025, 70% intrusion detection, and 3 cybersecurity incidents in Q1 2024
Validate whether our 85% EV encryption adoption rate by Q1 2025 positions us in the top quartile of EV manufacturers
Prepare board presentation comparing our 60% V2X integration rate and 3 cybersecurity incidents in Q1 2024 against Tesla and Ford
Search for V2X cybersecurity incident rates, specifically looking for companies with around 2-3 incidents per quarter like we experienced
Validate if having 40% of software updates include cybersecurity enhancements is adequate compared to automotive industry standards

eval_questions.question: What percentage of vehicle models have V2X communications integrated?
eval_questions.answer: 60% of vehicle models have V2X communications integrated as of Q2 2024.

eval_questions.question: What percentage of EVs have encryption by Q1 2025?
eval_questions.answer: 85% of EVs have encryption by Q1 2025.

eval_questions.question: How many EVs have intrusion detection by Q1 2025?
eval_questions.answer: 70% of EVs have intrusion detection systems by Q1 2025.

eval_questions.question: What percentage of software updates include cybersecurity enhancements?
eval_questions.answer: 40% of software updates include specific cybersecurity enhancements as of Q2 2024.

eval_questions.question: How many cybersecurity incidents were reported in Q1 of 2024?
eval_questions.answer: Three cybersecurity incidents reported in Q1 of 2024.

eval_questions.question: How many cybersecurity incidents occurred in V2X systems in Q2 2024?
eval_questions.answer: Two cybersecurity incidents were reported in V2X systems in Q2 2024.
